title: Render multi-outgoing diverge step (e.g. agent-runtime step 13)

messages.label: render(steps_json)
L1: place boxes / anchors / gates / ports
step 13 outgoing=2 -> place BranchAnchor (col_x, bottom+CW)
diverge:13 target=14 -> exit_dir=S; target=6 -> exit_dir=W
consecutive-gate competition -> diverge:13 simplified to dot
L3: route every transition starting at port
T20 (13->6) port.exit_dir=W -> route anchor -> bus -> step 6
T19 (13->14) port.exit_dir=S -> route anchor -> converge:14
L4: violations check
L5: compact + cross-row super-group
L6: emit SVG; render simplified diverge:13 as hollow dot at anchor

title: Suppress 1-in-1-out track gate (e.g. mcp.svg phantom bars)

messages.label: gate group has 1 source 1 target 1 condition
DD-7 suppress: do not add to gates; add condition as stub
edge becomes step-output to step-input direct
emit stub label off-spine; no phantom bar in SVG
detect sources>1 AND targets>1
DD-8 split: emit converge G_c (sources -> dummy) + diverge G_d (dummy -> targets)
share anchor y; one bar one dot per R-3
T forward, target row > source row + 1
DD-6 route via right-side bus, not left
anchor -> S -> right_bus_x -> S -> target row -> W -> target.input
